author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit de5052f. Matcher::prescreen: literal contains; regex via (?m)-prefixed shadow compiled once at construction — plain buffer is_match would false-skip anchored patterns like ^foo (caught in design, regression-tested). No shadow (= always maybe) for \A/\z and (?- flag-negation; \Z needs no guard since the regex crate rejects it at compile time (discovered via failing test). Soundness proptest: prescreen-reject implies no line matches. engine::apply early-returns unchanged; prescreen runs after range validation so bad range regexes still error. MEASURED: no_match 10k-line buffer 2.8ms -> 9.9us (~280x); recorded in CHANGELOG + bench no_match_prescreen group committed for #99's harness to reuse. 6 unit tests + 1 proptest. 23 suites green, clippy/fmt clean.
